steps.title: Identify the name's role
steps.content: The name Marie-Denise Villers identifies which little-known French portrait artist created the painting. Because the name is essential to identifying the artist, it should be attached directly to artist without punctuation.

steps.title: Reject unnecessary marks
steps.content: A uses a dash, C uses a colon, and D uses a comma; each treats the name as an aside or elaboration rather than an essential identifier. No punctuation keeps the identifying name properly attached. The answer is B.
